notes: Solid snake implementation with queued input, speed scaling, win/lose states, high score persistence, and audio; minor quirk in self-collision tail-tip logic but overall plays correctly.
Excellent implementation with audio, gradients, and proper tail-collision logic, though it drops rapid secondary inputs instead of queuing them.
Core snake gameplay is solid and likely error-free, but duplicate titleText definitions, minimal head detail, and some pause/input polish issues keep it from feeling truly polished or flawless.
